name: The Base Bar
_comment: GDD 22: the curated starting shelf. Twelve branded bottles - few enough to know by silhouette, each with an emotional identity. Tier 1 is the well you open with; tier 2+ are brand upgrades sold on the end-of-night market. Charges are per full glass (GDD 21 s4). ABV and origin are display/dialogue only and must never feed scoring.

cards.name: Astra Vodka
cards.blurb: Filters clean. Lifts the evening without asking questions.
cards.art_prompt: a slim clear vodka bottle with a pale blue-grey label band, minimal and cold

cards.name: Boothby Gin
cards.blurb: Juniper-forward. Settles a racing mind, at the cost of a quiet one.
cards.art_prompt: a squat dark green gin bottle with a cream label and a small crest, London dry style

cards.name: Coral Rum
cards.blurb: Sunlight in a bottle. Wakes people up and warms them through.
cards.art_prompt: a rounded white rum bottle with a coral-pink label and a palm motif

cards.name: Redline Bourbon
cards.blurb: Charred oak and patience. Talks people down off the ledge of a bad day.
cards.art_prompt: a stout amber bourbon bottle with a deep red wax top and a cream label

cards.name: Notte Amaro
cards.blurb: Bitter herbs for bitter moods. Meets anger head-on and wins.
cards.art_prompt: a dark brooding Italian amaro bottle with a midnight blue label, gold accents

cards.name: Velvet Vermouth
cards.blurb: Sweet red vermouth. Softens what ended badly.
cards.art_prompt: an elegant red vermouth bottle with a burgundy label and ornate serif frame

cards.name: House Syrup
cards.blurb: Plain sugar, dissolved slow. Comfort by the spoonful.
cards.art_prompt: a small clear glass cruet of simple syrup with a hand-written cream tag

cards.name: Fresh Lemon
cards.blurb: Cuts through the fog. Sharp enough to make some people flinch.
cards.art_prompt: a small glass carafe of fresh lemon juice with a cut lemon beside it

cards.name: Kicker Ginger
cards.blurb: Spiced ginger brew. Puts a spark back in - or a fire, if there was one already.
cards.art_prompt: a cloudy amber ginger beer bottle with a rust-orange label and a ceramic swing top

cards.name: Klara Soda
cards.blurb: Cold, clear, and calming. Waters everything down, on purpose.
cards.art_prompt: a tall clear soda siphon bottle with a pale teal label and rising bubbles

cards.name: Mint
cards.blurb: A sprig on top. Small, green, and quietly restorative.
cards.art_prompt: a small glass jar of fresh mint sprigs, bright green

cards.name: Luca Olives
cards.blurb: Brined and patient. Takes the edge off an argument.
cards.art_prompt: a small jar of green olives in brine with a rustic olive-branch label

cards.name: Vor Vodka
cards.blurb: Glacier-filtered. The same lift, cleaner and further.
cards.art_prompt: a premium frosted-glass vodka bottle with an ice-white label and silver cap

cards.name: Crown Gin
cards.blurb: Navy strength calm. Settles nerves that Boothby cannot reach.
cards.art_prompt: a tall regal gin bottle in deep navy glass with a gold crown on the label

cards.name: Harrow Bourbon
cards.blurb: Twelve years in the barrel. Anger does not argue with it.
cards.art_prompt: a heavy-bottomed aged bourbon bottle with a black wax seal and parchment label
